name: brndle/faq
title: FAQ Section
description: Frequently asked questions with CSS-only accordion.

items.question: Do I need a page builder?
items.answer: No. Brndle ships native Gutenberg blocks rendered server-side.

items.question: Will it work with my caching plugin?
items.answer: Yes. Brndle is fully compatible with WP Rocket, LiteSpeed, and others.
